name: @ezmannbuilds/orbit-axis-engine
description: Deterministic astrology calculation engine for Orbit Axis. Natal charts, houses, aspects, transits, lunar phase, and structured evidence, computed locally with Swiss Ephemeris.
author: EZmannBuilds

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/domain/*.js && node --check src/adapters/swiss-ephemeris/*.js && node --check src/contracts/v1/*.js && node --check tests/*.js && node --check scripts/*.js
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run runtime:check && npm test
